question: Which of these best describes the idea of sustainable development ?

options.1: (1) A model for development that focuses on industry growth and using resources for short-term profit.
options.2: (2) A idea first mentioned in the Brundtland Report in 1987, it is "development that meets the needs of the present generations without making it harder for future generations to meet their own needs".
options.3: (3) A plan put forward at the Stockholm Conference in 1972 that was solely focused on protecting wildlife.
options.4: (4) A plan from the UN to help poor countries become more globalized and open up their economies.
